title: Negative-Space Optical Illusion Poster
sourceTitle: Do This Ai Inferred Figures Colors Python

imagePrompts.prompt: do this for ai inferred figures and colors: python_scene_graph :: parametric_optical_illusion class variables: topic = "artisan coffee" duality = "infer opposing or layered meanings" primary_silhouette = "infer dominant readable outer shape" hidden_image = "infer secondary image from negative space" symbols = "infer minimal supporting symbols" palette = "infer 2-4 colors from mood" style = "minimalist negative-space poster" class composition: first_read = variables.primary_silhouette second_read = variables.hidden_image rule = "both images must share edges and contours" density = "low detail, high clarity" class shapelogic: black_shapes = "define primary silhouette" white_or_color_voids = "define hidden image" intersections = "designed so both readings remain intentional" class render: camera = "flat poster view" texture = "subtle paper grain optional" lighting = "none; graphic design clarity" output = "clean optical metaphor poster" def generate(): return "render artisan coffee as a dual-read negative-space image with no hard-coded symbols."

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

do this for ai inferred figures and colors: python_scene_graph :: parametric_optical_illusion class variables: topic = "artisan coffee" duality = "infer opposing or layered meanings" primary_silhouette = "infer dominant readable outer shape" hidden_image = "infer secondary image from negative space" symbols = "infer minimal supporting symbols" palette = "infer 2-4 colors from mood" style = "minimalist negative-space poster" class composition: first_read = variables.primary_silhouette second_read = variables.hidden_image rule = "both images must share edges and contours" density = "low detail, high clarity" class shapelogic: black_shapes = "define primary silhouette" white_or_color_voids = "define hidden image" intersections = "designed so both readings remain intentional" class render: camera = "flat poster view" texture = "subtle paper grain optional" lighting = "none; graphic design clarity" output = "clean optical metaphor poster" def generate(): return "render artisan coffee as a dual-read negative-space image with no hard-coded symbols."

imagePrompts.title: Do This Ai Inferred Figures Colors Python

prompt: do this for ai inferred figures and colors: python_scene_graph :: parametric_optical_illusion class variables: topic = "artisan coffee" duality = "infer opposing or layered meanings" primary_silhouette = "infer dominant readable outer shape" hidden_image = "infer secondary image from negative space" symbols = "infer minimal supporting symbols" palette = "infer 2-4 colors from mood" style = "minimalist negative-space poster" class composition: first_read = variables.primary_silhouette second_read = variables.hidden_image rule = "both images must share edges and contours" density = "low detail, high clarity" class shapelogic: black_shapes = "define primary silhouette" white_or_color_voids = "define hidden image" intersections = "designed so both readings remain intentional" class render: camera = "flat poster view" texture = "subtle paper grain optional" lighting = "none; graphic design clarity" output = "clean optical metaphor poster" def generate(): return "render artisan coffee as a dual-read negative-space image with no hard-coded symbols."
originalPrompt: do this for ai inferred figures and colors: python_scene_graph :: parametric_optical_illusion class variables: topic = "artisan coffee" duality = "infer opposing or layered meanings" primary_silhouette = "infer dominant readable outer shape" hidden_image = "infer secondary image from negative space" symbols = "infer minimal supporting symbols" palette = "infer 2-4 colors from mood" style = "minimalist negative-space poster" class composition: first_read = variables.primary_silhouette second_read = variables.hidden_image rule = "both images must share edges and contours" density = "low detail, high clarity" class shapelogic: black_shapes = "define primary silhouette" white_or_color_voids = "define hidden image" intersections = "designed so both readings remain intentional" class render: camera = "flat poster view" texture = "subtle paper grain optional" lighting = "none; graphic design clarity" output = "clean optical metaphor poster" def generate(): return "render artisan coffee as a dual-read negative-space image with no hard-coded symbols."

promptTranslations.zh:
为AI推断图像与颜色执行以下操作：

python_scene_graph :: 参数化光学错觉类变量：
  topic = "artisan coffee"
  duality = "推断对立或层叠含义"
  primary_silhouette = "推断主导可读外形"
  hidden_image = "从负空间推断次级图像"
  symbols = "推断最小支持符号"
  palette = "从情绪中推断2-4种颜色"
  style = "极简负空间海报"

类构成：
  first_read = variables.primary_silhouette
  second_read = variables.hidden_image
  rule = "两图共享边缘和轮廓"
  density = "低细节，高清晰"

类形状逻辑：
  black_shapes = "定义主轮廓"
  white_or_color_voids = "定义隐藏图"
  intersections = "设计确保两种读法均有意图"

类渲染：
  camera = "平面海报视角"
  texture = "可选细腻纸纹"
  lighting = "无，图形设计清晰度"
  output = "干净的光学隐喻海报"

def generate(): return "渲染artisan coffee为双重可读负空间图像，无硬编码符号。"
promptTranslations.fr: faire ceci pour les figures inférées par IA et les couleurs : python_scene_graph :: variables de classe d’illusion optique paramétrique : topic = "artisan coffee" duality = "inférer des significations opposées ou en couches" primary_silhouette = "inférer la forme extérieure dominante et lisible" hidden_image = "inférer une image secondaire à partir de l’espace négatif" symbols = "inférer des symboles de soutien minimalistes" palette = "inférer 2-4 couleurs selon l’humeur" style = "affiche minimaliste en espace négatif" composition de classe : first_read = variables.primary_silhouette second_read = variables.hidden_image rule = "les deux images doivent partager bords et contours" density = "faible détail, haute clarté" logique_forme de classe : black_shapes = "définir la silhouette principale" white_or_color_voids = "définir l’image cachée" intersections = "conçues pour que les deux lectures restent intentionnelles" rendu de classe : camera = "vue d’affiche plate" texture = "grain de papier subtil optionnel" lighting = "aucun; clarté graphique" output = "affiche métaphore optique propre" def generate(): return "rendre artisan coffee comme une image à double lecture en espace négatif sans symboles codés en dur."
promptTranslations.ru: сделайте это для фигур и цветов, выведенных ИИ: python_scene_graph :: parametric_optical_illusion class variables: topic = "artisan coffee" duality = "выводить противоположные или многослойные смыслы" primary_silhouette = "выводить доминирующий читаемый внешний контур" hidden_image = "выводить второстепенное изображение из негативного пространства" symbols = "выводить минимальные поддерживающие символы" palette = "выводить 2-4 цвета из настроения" style = "минималистичный постер с негативным пространством" class composition: first_read = variables.primary_silhouette second_read = variables.hidden_image rule = "оба изображения должны разделять контуры и края" density = "низкая детализация, высокая чёткость" class shapelogic: black_shapes = "определяют основную силуэтную форму" white_or_color_voids = "определяют скрытое изображение" intersections = "спроектированы так, чтобы оба прочтения оставались осознанными" class render: camera = "плоский вид постера" texture = "нежная зернистость бумаги (опционально)" lighting = "отсутствует; максимальная чёткость графики" output = "чистый постер с оптической метафорой" def generate(): return "отрендерить artisan coffee как изображение с двойным прочтением в негативном пространстве без жёстко заданных символов."
promptTranslations.pt: faça isso para figuras e cores inferidas por ia: python_scene_graph :: parametric_optical_illusion class variables: topic = "artisan coffee" duality = "inferir significados opostos ou em camadas" primary_silhouette = "inferir forma externa dominante legível" hidden_image = "inferir imagem secundária a partir do espaço negativo" symbols = "inferir símbolos mínimos de apoio" palette = "inferir 2-4 cores de acordo com o humor" style = "pôster minimalista de espaço negativo" class composition: first_read = variables.primary_silhouette second_read = variables.hidden_image rule = "ambas as imagens devem compartilhar bordas e contornos" density = "baixa definição, alta clareza" class shapelogic: black_shapes = "definir silhueta principal" white_or_color_voids = "definir imagem oculta" intersections = "projetado para que ambas leituras permaneçam intencionais" class render: camera = "vista plana de pôster" texture = "granulação sutil de papel opcional" lighting = "nenhuma; clareza gráfica de design" output = "pôster limpo de metáfora óptica" def generate(): return "renderizar artisan coffee como uma imagem de espaço negativo de leitura dupla sem símbolos codificados."
promptTranslations.ja:
AI推論された図形と色を処理するためのpython_scene_graph : parametric_optical_illusion クラス変数：
topic = "artisan coffee"
duality = "反対または重層的な意味を推論する"
primary_silhouette = "支配的で読み取り可能な外形を推論する"
hidden_image = "ネガティブスペースからの二次的な画像を推論する"
symbols = "最小限の補助的シンボルを推論する"
palette = "ムードから2-4色を推論する"
style = "ミニマリストなネガティブスペースポスター"

クラス composition:
  first_read = variables.primary_silhouette
  second_read = variables.hidden_image
  rule = "両画像は境界線と輪郭を共有しなければならない"
  density = "低詳細、高い明瞭さ"

クラス shapelogic:
  black_shapes = "主たるシルエットを定義する"
  white_or_color_voids = "隠れた画像を定義する"
  intersections = "両読み取りが意図的に維持されるよう設計する"

クラス render:
  camera = "フラットなポスタービュー"
  texture = "微妙な紙の質感（オプション）"
  lighting = "なし；グラフィックデザインの明瞭さ"
  output = "クリーンな光学的メタファーポスター"

def generate():
  return "artisan coffee を硬コードされたシンボルなしの二重解釈可能なネガティブスペース画像としてレンダリングする。"
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.

do this for ai inferred figures and colors: python_scene_graph :: parametric_optical_illusion class variables: topic = "artisan coffee" duality = "infer opposing or layered meanings" primary_silhouette = "infer dominant readable outer shape" hidden_image = "infer secondary image from negative space" symbols = "infer minimal supporting symbols" palette = "infer 2-4 colors from mood" style = "minimalist negative-space poster" class composition: first_read = variables.primary_silhouette second_read = variables.hidden_image rule = "both images must share edges and contours" density = "low detail, high clarity" class shapelogic: black_shapes = "define primary silhouette" white_or_color_voids = "define hidden image" intersections = "designed so both readings remain intentional" class render: camera = "flat poster view" texture = "subtle paper grain optional" lighting = "none; graphic design clarity" output = "clean optical metaphor poster" def generate(): return "render artisan coffee as a dual-read negative-space image with no hard-coded symbols."
